replacements.description: If a red source you control would deal an amount of noncombat damage less than NICKNAME's power to an opponent, that source deals damage equal to NICKNAME's power instead.

triggers.description: When NICKNAME dies, return it to the battlefield tapped and transformed under its owner's control.

abilities.description: Transform CARDNAME. Activate only if red sources you controlled dealt 4 or more noncombat damage this turn and only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Transform CARDNAME. Activate only if red sources you controlled dealt 4 or more noncombat damage this turn and only as a sorcery.
effect.name: SetState
